title: Master Claude Code with Claude Fable 5 (57 mins)
summary: Keith AI's 57-minute video demonstrates advanced use of Claude Code as a coding system rather than a chat interface. The video covers Desktop, CLI, and web modes, permissions, connectors, slash commands, plugins, routines, sub-agents, and dynamic workflows for building apps and automating development workflows.
writeup: Keith AI's 57-minute walkthrough frames Claude Code as a coding system rather than a chat interface, covering its Desktop, CLI, and web modes. The video works through permissions, connectors, slash commands, plugins, routines, sub-agents, and dynamic workflows for building apps and automating development tasks. The takeaway is a practical map of how these components combine to drive agentic, multi-step development work beyond single prompts.
